# github: contribution: suggest doesn't work on last week with Sunday

```bash
maintainer github contribution suggest --delta 2022-07-10
 Day / Week    #51    #52    #1    #2    #3
------------- ------ ------ ----- ----- ----
 Sunday         -      -      -     -    -
 Monday         -      -      -     -    -
 Tuesday        -      -      -     -    -
 Wednesday      -      -      -     -    -
 Thursday       -      -      -     -    -
 Friday         -      -      -     -    -
 Saturday       -      -      -     -    -
------------- ------ ------ ----- ----- ----
 Suggestion is 0001-01-01: -106751d, 0 -> 0
```

There is no 2022-07-10.
